column1:
👋 How to Use DreamShift Connection Bank?
Start by thinking of people who might be helpful in your job search - even indirectly. Add them to this sheet as you go.

➡ You can't edit this file directly.
Instead, go to the top left, click on File → Make a Copy, rename it with your name, and save it to your Google Drive.

Step-by-step:
➜ Start with your phone contacts – go through people you’ve worked with, studied with, or are close to.
➜ Then check your LinkedIn – look for people working in your industry, target companies, or recruiters.
➜ Next, try Instagram, WhatsApp, Facebook, etc. – casual contacts can also open doors.

When messaging someone, here’s a simple way to ask for help:
"Hi! Hope you’re doing well. These days, I’m open for [Job Title/s] in [Location]. 
If anyone comes to your mind who might be able to give me advice or any help, I’d really appreciate it if you could send one or two contacts."

Important Notes:
➜ You don’t need to only focus on people who directly know someone hiring.
➜ Sometimes, your contact knows someone who knows someone - and that’s just as valuable.

Start small, be consistent, and keep track of everyone here. You’ll be surprised how many people are willing to help!
